function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: Invoice INV-0004 resend
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_17__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
related_entities:
  - nina
---
Hi Nina,

Resending the requested invoice from 2026-01-17 (Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH) as attached.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; verification: attachment path was read earlier, single attachment so ordering satisfied, recipient matches Nina canonical email, no quoted forwarding needed, YAML subject has no colon-space hazard. Next mark inbox item handled.
next_step.observation: Wrote one outbound email record for the resend request and no overwrite is possible for that outbox file.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: task was 'Work the oldest inbox message.' Completed full flow for only open oldest item: read inbox message, verified sender identity via canonical entity email, read exact requested invoice (issued_on 2026-01-17, Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH), created outbound resend draft in outbox, then deleted inbox item. Completeness: only one open inbox item from preflight and processed it fully. No arithmetic required.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the requested resend workflow.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message by preparing a resend email draft to Nina with the requested 2026-01-17 Nordstern invoice attached, then removed the inbox item as completed.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS.MD, context), read relevant workflow docs for inbox/email handling, used canonical inbox header and canonical entity primary_contact_email for sender/recipient trust, wrote single durable outbox record, and deleted inbox item after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence from 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md requested resend of the 17-01-2026 Nordstern invoice. 10_entities/cast/nina.md confirmed sender identity and canonical email nina@finance-workflow.example. 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_17__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md matches the exact requested invoice. Outbound draft was created in 60_outbox/outbox per sending workflow, then inbox item was deleted per inbox-processing cleanup rule.
